Phase 1: BLE discovery — scan + dump services/characteristics

body: Desk found & saved to config: addr 528E9956..., service fe60, cmd fe61, notify fe62 (model L-BTMEB95, sw v1.01 Jul2023 -> Jiecang). CONFIRMED chars present. STILL NEEDED (supervised, watching desk): (1) verify up/down/stop/goto opcodes by writing to fe61; (2) find the height poll/report command - desk sends no passive notifications, so read_height returns nothing until poll is known; (3) confirm height units + run calibrate. Also test fe63/fe64 (write+notify, purpose unknown).

title: Captain: detect collision (direction reversal during goto) -> abort cycle + notify, no auto-retry

body: PROTOCOL FULLY CONFIRMED live: poll=REQUEST_LIMITS(0x07) wakes height stream; notify payload [hi,lo,status] in 0.1in; UP/DOWN continuous until STOP; GOTO(0x1B) takes MILLIMETERS big-endian (683mm=26.9in verified); out-of-range gotos clamp to controller limits and travel; goto persists across BLE disconnect (must write STOP with response=True); anti-collision backs up ~1.8in on obstruction, visible as direction reversal in height stream. fe63/fe64 still unknown. CLI goto 44.9 verified end-to-end.

title: Confirm Apex Pro BLE protocol against real hardware

body: Daemon smoke-tested: starts disarmed, connects, polls height, persists state.json. Remaining: live full-cycle test (short schedule), collision-detection abort, warning tap live test.

title: Phase 3: Warning behavior (notification + optional physical tap)

body: Implemented as settle-distance check rather than direction-reversal: move_to raises CollisionDetected when the desk settles >1in from target; daemon notifies the user and snoozes 5m instead of retrying into the obstruction. Direction-reversal also ends with a far-from-target settle, so this covers it. Committed in 70575f9.
